meaning: n.粗暴而又好争吵的人,吵嚷者,小流氓adj.吵闹的,粗暴的
examples: He has complained to the police about rowdy neighbours.
The teacher made the rowdy class quiet down .
A rowdy group of boys ran through the streets.
If they're just as rowdy come Monday evening, that one last question will finally be answered.
At first she ignored it, figuring it was from rowdy students coming home from a bar.
